message:
feat(testing): Add Failure State Dump for E2E test debugging

Implements automatic diagnostic state capture on test failure:
- FailureDump struct captures 6 categories of debug info
- Environment variables (sanitized via existing function)
- Temp directory listing (recursive with depth limit)
- Log tail (last 100 lines of cass.log, stdout, stderr)
- Database state (SQLite schema and row counts)
- Git state (branch, commit, uncommitted changes)
- Process info (PID, memory usage, open file handles)

Integrated with PhaseTracker::drop() to auto-dump on panic.
Standalone dump_failure_state() function for shell integration.

Closes: coding_agent_session_search-rtpd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
